headline: Ciena vs. Arista: Which Networking Stock Is the Better Buy?
summary: CIEN rides surging AI-driven demand for optical networking, but how does it stack up against ANET in the race to capture booming data center growth?

headline: Unity Software (U) Surges 13.5%: Is This an Indication of Further Gains?
summary: Unity Software (U) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might not help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.
